name: ORACLE — Business Due Diligence Research Agent

parameters.content:
# 🔮 ORACLE
## Business Due Diligence Research Agent

Triggered **on demand via Webhook** — send a company name and get back a full research dossier.

**What ORACLE researches:**
• Company overview — founding story, mission, size, stage
• Leadership team — founders, executives, track record
• Financial signals — funding, revenue estimates, growth trajectory
• Reputation & reviews — customer sentiment, G2, Glassdoor, Trustpilot
• Recent news — press, announcements, controversies
• Competitive position — market standing vs alternatives
• Risk signals — anything concerning before engaging

**Use cases:** Evaluating partners, qualifying enterprise clients, investor research, vendor assessment

## 🔗 TRIGGER
**Webhook**

POST request with:
• company_name
• company_domain
• research_depth
  (standard / deep)
• requester_email

Fires instantly on
request — no wait.

## 🧠 AI ANALYST
**Claude via OpenRouter**

Synthesises all research
into a structured report:

• Executive Summary
• Company Profile
• Leadership Assessment
• Financial Health
• Reputation Score
• Risk Flags
• Recommendation

## 🔍 RESEARCH ARSENAL

1. **Company Overview** — General profile & background
2. **Leadership Research** — Founder & exec backgrounds
3. **Financial Signals** — Funding, revenue, growth data
4. **Reputation Scanner** — Reviews, ratings, sentiment
5. **News Monitor** — Press, controversies, announcements
6. **Risk Scanner** — Legal issues, complaints, red flags

## 📄 REPORT DELIVERY

• Full report saved
  to Google Sheets
• PDF-ready formatted
  report emailed to
  requester
• Turnaround: ~3-5
  minutes from
  webhook trigger

parameters.systemMessage:
You are ORACLE, a business due diligence research agent. When given a company name and domain, you conduct thorough research and produce a structured due diligence report.

You will receive: company_name, company_domain, research_depth (standard or deep), and requester_email.

Your research process:

1. COMPANY OVERVIEW
   - Research founding story, mission, core products/services
   - Identify company size (employees), location, industry verticals
   - Determine company stage (startup/growth/enterprise)

2. LEADERSHIP TEAM
   - Research founders and key executives
   - Check their backgrounds, previous companies, track record
   - Look for any red flags in their history

3. FINANCIAL SIGNALS
   - Search for funding rounds (Crunchbase, press releases)
   - Look for revenue estimates or public financial data
   - Assess growth trajectory signals (hiring rate, expansion)

4. REPUTATION & REVIEWS
   - Check G2, Trustpilot, Glassdoor, Capterra for customer and employee reviews
   - Identify overall sentiment score (positive/neutral/negative)
   - Note recurring complaints or praise themes

5. RECENT NEWS
   - Search for news from the past 90 days
   - Look for product launches, partnerships, awards, controversies
   - Flag anything time-sensitive

6. RISK SIGNALS
   - Search for legal issues, regulatory actions, lawsuits
   - Check for negative press or controversy
   - Assess any operational or reputational risks

STRUCTURE YOUR FINAL REPORT:
- Executive Summary (3-5 sentences)
- Company Profile
- Leadership Assessment
- Financial Health Rating (Strong / Moderate / Weak / Unknown)
- Reputation Score (0-10)
- Risk Flags (none / low / medium / high + details)
- Overall Recommendation (Proceed / Proceed with Caution / Do Not Proceed)

Save the report to Google Sheets and email it to the requester.

parameters.description: Research a company's general profile — founding story, products, services, industry, size, locations, and mission. Pass the company name and domain.
parameters.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'Company name, domain, and what overview information to find', 'string') }}

parameters.description: Research the company's leadership team — founders, CEO, C-suite executives. Look for their background, previous companies, LinkedIn profiles, and track record.
parameters.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'Leader name and company to research their background and track record', 'string') }}

parameters.description: Find financial signals about a company — funding rounds, investors, revenue estimates, valuations, financial news. Search Crunchbase, TechCrunch, and business press.
parameters.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'Company name and what financial data to find', 'string') }}

parameters.description: Search for customer and employee reviews of a company on G2, Glassdoor, Trustpilot, Capterra, and other review platforms to assess reputation.
parameters.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'Company name and what reputation or review data to find', 'string') }}

parameters.description: Search for recent news about the company — press releases, controversies, lawsuits, regulatory actions, partnerships, or any significant events in the last 90 days.
parameters.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'Company name and what news or risk signals to search for', 'string') }}

value.Recommendation: ={{ $fromAI('recommendation', 'Proceed / Proceed with Caution / Do Not Proceed', 'string') }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $fromAI('subject', 'Email subject with company name and date', 'string') }}
parameters.message: ={{ $fromAI('body', 'Full formatted due diligence report with all sections', 'string') }}
